title: T-016 — POST /api/scheduler/assignments/:id/reject
prompt:
# T-016 — POST /api/scheduler/assignments/:id/reject

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §8.2 reject, §9.3 business rules
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement reject endpoint that flips assignment.status='rejected' (returning the WO to unscheduled pool for next run consideration).

## Implementation contract
1. Route `apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/assignments/[assignmentId]/reject/route.ts`: POST body { user_id, reason_notes? }.
2. UPDATE assignment SET status='rejected'; do NOT update work_orders.planned_start_time (preserved for next run).
3. RBAC: Planner Advanced or Scheduling Officer; 403 otherwise.
4. 409 if status != 'draft'.

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/assignments/[assignmentId]/reject/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/assignments/[assignmentId]/reject/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a draft assignment + Planner role, when POST runs, then assignment.status='rejected' and work_orders.planned_start_time UNCHANGED
2. Given an approved assignment, when POST runs, then 409 returned
3. Given role 'Operator', when POST runs, then 403 returned

## Test strategy
- RED: write __tests__/route.test.ts covering rejection state + work_orders untouched + 409 + 403
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test scheduler/assignments/reject'

## Risk red lines
- Do not update work_orders fields on reject (assignment returns to pool)
- Do not bypass RBAC
- Do not allow reject on already-approved assignment (409 mandatory)

pipeline_inputs.description: Reject assignment without touching work_orders.planned_start_time; RBAC + 409 conflict guard.
pipeline_inputs.details: Simple status flip endpoint. Crucial: no work_orders.planned_start_time mutation (WO returns to unscheduled pool implicitly). RBAC enforced. 409 on non-draft state.
out_of_scope: Do not emit outbox event for reject (PRD §9.8 lists only approved/overridden)
Do not implement bulk reject UI here (T-052)

Given an approved assignment, when POST runs, then 409 returned
Given role 'Operator', when POST runs, then 403 returned
